root_text.an1.82:1.1: “Nāhaṁ, bhikkhave, aññaṁ ekadhammampi samanupassāmi yo evaṁ mahato anatthāya saṁvattati yathayidaṁ, bhikkhave, pamādo.
root_text.an1.83:1.1: “Nāhaṁ, bhikkhave, aññaṁ ekadhammampi samanupassāmi yo evaṁ mahato atthāya saṁvattati yathayidaṁ, bhikkhave, appamādo.
root_text.an1.84:1.1: “Nāhaṁ, bhikkhave, aññaṁ ekadhammampi samanupassāmi yo evaṁ mahato anatthāya saṁvattati yathayidaṁ, bhikkhave, kosajjaṁ.
root_text.an1.85:1.1: “Nāhaṁ, bhikkhave, aññaṁ ekadhammampi samanupassāmi yo evaṁ mahato atthāya saṁvattati yathayidaṁ, bhikkhave, vīriyārambho.
root_text.an1.86:1.1: “Nāhaṁ, bhikkhave, aññaṁ ekadhammampi samanupassāmi yo evaṁ mahato anatthāya saṁvattati yathayidaṁ, bhikkhave, mahicchatā.
root_text.an1.87:1.1: “Nāhaṁ, bhikkhave, aññaṁ ekadhammampi samanupassāmi yo evaṁ mahato atthāya saṁvattati yathayidaṁ, bhikkhave, appicchatā.
root_text.an1.88:1.1: “Nāhaṁ, bhikkhave, aññaṁ ekadhammampi samanupassāmi yo evaṁ mahato anatthāya saṁvattati yathayidaṁ, bhikkhave, asantuṭṭhitā.
root_text.an1.89:1.1: “Nāhaṁ, bhikkhave, aññaṁ ekadhammampi samanupassāmi yo evaṁ mahato atthāya saṁvattati yathayidaṁ, bhikkhave, santuṭṭhitā.
root_text.an1.90:1.1: “Nāhaṁ, bhikkhave, aññaṁ ekadhammampi samanupassāmi yo evaṁ mahato anatthāya saṁvattati yathayidaṁ, bhikkhave, ayonisomanasikāro.
root_text.an1.91:1.1: “Nāhaṁ, bhikkhave, aññaṁ ekadhammampi samanupassāmi yo evaṁ mahato atthāya saṁvattati yathayidaṁ, bhikkhave, yoniso manasikāro.
root_text.an1.92:1.1: “Nāhaṁ, bhikkhave, aññaṁ ekadhammampi samanupassāmi yo evaṁ mahato anatthāya saṁvattati yathayidaṁ, bhikkhave, asampajaññaṁ.
root_text.an1.93:1.1: “Nāhaṁ, bhikkhave, aññaṁ ekadhammampi samanupassāmi yo evaṁ mahato atthāya saṁvattati yathayidaṁ, bhikkhave, sampajaññaṁ.
root_text.an1.94:1.1: “Nāhaṁ, bhikkhave, aññaṁ ekadhammampi samanupassāmi yo evaṁ mahato anatthāya saṁvattati yathayidaṁ, bhikkhave, pāpamittatā.
root_text.an1.95:1.1: “Nāhaṁ, bhikkhave, aññaṁ ekadhammampi samanupassāmi yo evaṁ mahato atthāya saṁvattati yathayidaṁ, bhikkhave, kalyāṇamittatā.
root_text.an1.96:1.1: “Nāhaṁ, bhikkhave, aññaṁ ekadhammampi samanupassāmi yo evaṁ mahato anatthāya saṁvattati yathayidaṁ, bhikkhave, anuyogo akusalānaṁ dhammānaṁ, ananuyogo kusalānaṁ dhammānaṁ.
root_text.an1.96:1.2: Anuyogo, bhikkhave, akusalānaṁ dhammānaṁ, ananuyogo kusalānaṁ dhammānaṁ mahato anatthāya saṁvattatī”ti.
root_text.an1.97:1.1: “Nāhaṁ, bhikkhave, aññaṁ ekadhammampi samanupassāmi yo evaṁ mahato atthāya saṁvattati yathayidaṁ, bhikkhave, anuyogo kusalānaṁ dhammānaṁ, ananuyogo akusalānaṁ dhammānaṁ.
root_text.an1.97:1.2: Anuyogo, bhikkhave, kusalānaṁ dhammānaṁ, ananuyogo akusalānaṁ dhammānaṁ mahato atthāya saṁvattatī”ti.

translation_text.an1.82:1.1: “Mendicants, I do not see a single thing that is so very harmful as negligence.
translation_text.an1.83:1.1: “Mendicants, I do not see a single thing that is so very beneficial as diligence.
translation_text.an1.84:1.1: “Mendicants, I do not see a single thing that is so very harmful as laziness.
translation_text.an1.85:1.1: “Mendicants, I do not see a single thing that is so very beneficial as arousing energy.
translation_text.an1.86:1.1: “Mendicants, I do not see a single thing that is so very harmful as having many wishes.
translation_text.an1.86:1.2: Having many wishes is very harmful.”
translation_text.an1.87:1.1: “Mendicants, I do not see a single thing that is so very beneficial as having few wishes.
translation_text.an1.87:1.2: Having few wishes is very beneficial.”
translation_text.an1.88:1.1: “Mendicants, I do not see a single thing that is so very harmful as lack of contentment.
translation_text.an1.88:1.2: Lack of contentment is very harmful.”
translation_text.an1.89:1.1: “Mendicants, I do not see a single thing that is so very beneficial as contentment.
translation_text.an1.90:1.1: “Mendicants, I do not see a single thing that is so very harmful as irrational application of mind.
translation_text.an1.90:1.2: Irrational application of mind is very harmful.”
translation_text.an1.91:1.1: “Mendicants, I do not see a single thing that is so very beneficial as rational application of mind.
translation_text.an1.91:1.2: Rational application of mind is very beneficial.”
translation_text.an1.92:1.1: “Mendicants, I do not see a single thing that is so very harmful as lack of situational awareness.
translation_text.an1.92:1.2: Lack of situational awareness is very harmful.”
translation_text.an1.93:1.1: “Mendicants, I do not see a single thing that is so very beneficial as situational awareness.
translation_text.an1.94:1.1: “Mendicants, I do not see a single thing that is so very harmful as bad friends.
translation_text.an1.95:1.1: “Mendicants, I do not see a single thing that is so very beneficial as good friends.
translation_text.an1.96:1.1: “Mendicants, I do not see a single thing that is so very harmful as pursuing bad habits and not good habits.
translation_text.an1.96:1.2: Pursuing bad habits and not good habits is very harmful.”
translation_text.an1.97:1.1: “Mendicants, I do not see a single thing that is so very beneficial as pursuing good habits and not bad habits.
translation_text.an1.97:1.2: Pursuing good habits and not bad habits is very beneficial.”
